ogTitle: South Wentworthville vs South West Rocks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Wentworthville and South West Rocks.
heading: South Wentworthville vs South West Rocks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Wentworthville, New South Wales and South West Rocks, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Wentworthville has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to South West Rocks (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Wentworthville or South West Rocks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Wentworthville has a flood risk score of 31/100, while South West Rocks scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Wentworthville scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. South West Rocks scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Wentworthville or South West Rocks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Wentworthville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
